query:
CREATE TABLE `task_queue` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `type` enum('purchase_sync','transfer_sync') NOT NULL,
  `referenceId` int NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('pending','processing','completed','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `attempts` int DEFAULT 0,
  `maxAttempts` int DEFAULT 3,
  `lastError` text,
  `payload` json,
  `scheduledAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `processedAt` timestamp,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `task_queue_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3C3YedTYyRZ9gp1.root --database ELm6QT6PJVYqbTF7mNfFga --execute CREATE TABLE `task_queue` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `type` enum('purchase_sync','transfer_sync') NOT NULL,
  `referenceId` int NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('pending','processing','completed','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `attempts` int DEFAULT 0,
  `maxAttempts` int DEFAULT 3,
  `lastError` text,
  `payload` json,
  `scheduledAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `processedAt` timestamp,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `task_queue_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
